Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Plaintiff Arlene Uribe Ramsay aka Arlene Ramsay was represented by Ray Weskley Sherman, Esq. The default was entered against Daniel Larks on 1/28/04. Does 1 thru 10 dismissed on 2/9/04. Evidence received, matter argued and submitted. Plaintiff to prepare revised proposed judgment.

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Continued To Mar-25-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott,
CSR: Deborah Neville
Counsel: Ray W. Sherman, Jr. for Plaintiff, Arlene Uribe Ramsey aka Arlene Ramsey
No appearance by Plaintiff:
Plaintiff's attorney requested a continuance to 3/25/04. Court granted the continuance.
